description: Bounded SkillOpt-style candidates accepted only after held-out live-suite improvement. Scores are filled by scripts/skill-optimization-report.mjs from live result files.

patch.reason: Make activated behavior explicit for implementation, safety, testing, and SkillOpt questions instead of falling back to generic docs snippets.
Teach routers that cost, security, agentic workflow, and optimization questions belong to docs search.
Prevent docs search from taking over catalog or admin execution work.
Bind the Skill to bounded patch budgets and fast/slow optimization state.
Preserve price, size, color, stock, and no-mutation facts in the final visible answer and action cards.
Cover natural catalog phrasing beyond exact product names.
Keep catalog search out of docs and admin workflows.
